title: lathyrus pannonicus var. asphodeloides
intro: Lathyrus pannonicus var. asphodeloides, also known as the Hungarian pea, is a variety of flowering plant in the genus Lathyrus. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include diuretic, expectorant, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Lathyrus pannonicus var. asphodeloides are attributed to its ability to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of Lathyrus pannonicus var. asphodeloides include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
